product_overview: Dental Lab ERP is a comprehensive web-based management system tailored for dental laboratories. It facilitates efficient management of orders, doctors, suppliers, finances, and daily workflows through an intuitive, role-based interface.
core_goals: Enable role-based access control for secure and appropriate user permissions.
Provide a centralized dashboard offering real-time statistics, alerts, and quick access to common actions.
Facilitate complete lifecycle management of dental lab orders with filtering, status tracking, comments, and technical approval actions.
Offer robust management of associated doctors and suppliers, including custom pricing and detailed records.
Support financial operations including income, expenses, transaction tracking, and detailed account statements.
Deliver advanced analytics and AI-powered insights for business optimization.
Ensure scalable, maintainable, and secure architecture built with modern technologies like React, TypeScript, and Supabase.
key_features: Authentication with Supabase supporting login/logout and role-based controls.
Dashboard with statistics, alerts, and workload indicators plus quick action buttons.
Orders management with CRUD functionality, search, filtering, pagination, comments, status updates, and export capabilities.
Order status lifecycle including stages from Pending Review to Delivered and handling rejections/adjustments.
Doctors and Suppliers management featuring listing, creation, editing, and pricing customization.
Finance module for income/expense monitoring and transaction management.
Account statements for doctors and suppliers with a comprehensive overview.
Analytics module displaying order and revenue reports enriched with AI insights.
Role-based UI restrictions, ensuring only authorized roles perform sensitive actions (e.g., Accept/Reject orders).
Designer-specific dashboard for targeted workflow efficiency.
Export utilities supporting Excel and print outputs for orders and reports.
user_flow_summary: Users authenticate via login page with credentials validated through Supabase Auth, then redirected to appropriate dashboard.
Dashboard displays key metrics and alerts related to orders and workload; users can initiate new orders or add doctors quickly.
Users access the orders page, apply filters or search to find orders, add comments, update order statuses, and perform tech actions if authorized.
Doctors and suppliers are managed via dedicated pages enabling add/edit operations and viewing detailed information.
Finance users track transactions, income, and expenses with options to view accounts for doctors and suppliers.
Reports and analytics pages offer insights, including AI-enhanced analytics for business decisions.
Role validations ensure feature access is aligned with user roles — e.g., only admins, designers, and lab roles can accept/reject orders.
validation_criteria: Successful login redirects users to the dashboard and display user identity in the header.
Orders list loads correctly with supported pagination and filtering, and search queries produce accurate results.
Comments added to orders are saved and persist after page refresh.
Dashboard cards accurately reflect real-time data including alerts for rejected, overdue, and pending approvals.
Role-based controls prevent unauthorized users from accessing or performing restricted actions like Accept/Reject order.
New order and doctor creation workflows complete successfully for permitted roles (admin, representative).
Finance transactions and account statements display accurate financial data for doctors and suppliers.
Analytics and AI insights render correctly and update according to latest data.
Export functions produce correct Excel files and printable views without errors.
User interface correctly adapts to roles, showing or hiding elements according to permissions.
